name: Masharee3 v1
description: Masharee3 is a construction intelligence platform with a strong dark-mode identity — deep navy backgrounds anchor the cover and slides, while the logo's vivid teal-green acts as the sole energizing accent. The reference PDF shows a clean two-tone system (dark navy walls + bright teal CTA blocks) with no gradient stripe, so the cover uses a solid-dark treatment and the accent stripe is eliminated entirely. Typography pairs the confident geometric weight of Space Grotesk for headings with the readable clarity of Inter for body copy, reflecting a data-first, action-oriented product personality. Radii are kept tight-to-medium to reinforce the structured, professional feel of a B2B intelligence tool.
